user.title: Set up Stiebel DHE Connect
user.description: Configure the local connection to your DHE Connect. Confirm pairing on the DHE when prompted during the first connection.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the DHE. Check the IP address and port.
error.poll_interval_too_low: Value polling must be at least 60 seconds.
error.invalid_host: Invalid host. Enter only an IP address or hostname, without path, username or port.
error.invalid_port: Invalid port. The port must be between 1 and 65535.
error.poll_interval_too_high: Value polling must be at most 86400 seconds.

abort.already_configured: Stiebel DHE Connect is already configured.

init.title: Configure Stiebel DHE Connect
init.description: Change IP address, port, device name and value polling.
